Uses of Class
sc.fiji.snt.analysis.curation.PlausibilityCheck.LiveCheck

Packages that use PlausibilityCheck.LiveCheck
Package
Description
sc.fiji.snt.analysis.curation
Classes for curation of reconstructions, as implemented by the "Curation Assistant".

  • Uses of PlausibilityCheck.LiveCheck in sc.fiji.snt.analysis.curation

    Subclasses of PlausibilityCheck.LiveCheck in sc.fiji.snt.analysis.curation
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static class 
    PlausibilityCheck.BranchAngle
    Warns when the bifurcation angle at a fork is outside a plausible range.
    static class 
    PlausibilityCheck.ConstantRadii
    Warns when a path has radii assigned, but they are all identical (likely unfitted defaults).
    static class 
    PlausibilityCheck.DirectionContinuity
    Warns when the child path's initial direction deviates sharply from the parent's tangent at the branch point (potential U-turn).
    static class 
    PlausibilityCheck.InterForkDistance
    Warns when two consecutive forks on the same parent path are implausibly close together.
    static class 
    PlausibilityCheck.RadiusContinuity
    Warns when the child neurite's radius at the fork point exceeds the parent's radius at the branch point.
    static class 
    PlausibilityCheck.SomaDistance
    Warns when a primary path starts far from any soma node.
    static class 
    PlausibilityCheck.TerminalBranchLength
    Warns when a terminal path is suspiciously short.
    static class 
    PlausibilityCheck.TortuosityConsistency
    Warns when child and parent have very different tortuosity (contraction).

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    <T extends PlausibilityCheck.LiveCheck>
    T
    PlausibilityMonitor.getLiveCheck(Class<T> type)
    Convenience method to get a specific live check by type.

    Modifier and Type

    Methods in sc.fiji.snt.analysis.curation with parameters of type PlausibilityCheck.LiveCheck
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    PlausibilityCheck.Measurements
    PlausibilityMonitor.measure(PlausibilityCheck.LiveCheck liveCheck, Collection<Path> paths)
    Collects the raw distribution of liveCheck's metric across paths without applying its warning threshold.
